---
title: 'From Twitter DarrellWolfe January 03, 2014 at 04:17PM'
date: '2014-01-03T22:36:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '72660380361349951'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/from-twitter-darrellwolfe-january-03.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Twitter'
---

<div xmlns='http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml'>Content for my tribe: "5 Pieces of Diet Advice You’re Better Off Skipping" http://t.co/THTkYBtegv #Blogging<br /><blockquote class='twitter-tweet'><br /><p>Content for my tribe: "5 Pieces of Diet Advice You’re Better Off Skipping" <a href='http://t.co/THTkYBtegv'>http://t.co/THTkYBtegv</a> <a href='https://twitter.com/search?q=%23Blogging&amp;src=hash'>#Blogging</a> </p><br />— Darrell G Wolfe (@DarrellWolfe) <a href='https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe/statuses/419230993888051200'>January 3, 2014</a> </blockquote><br /><script type='text/javascript' charset='utf-8' src='//platform.twitter.com/widgets.js' async=''><br /></script><br/><br />from Twitter https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe<br/><br /><br/><br />January 03, 2014 at 04:17PM<br/><br />via <a href='https://ifttt.com/?ref=da&amp;site=blogger'>IFTTT</a></div>
